title: Stichorkis ovalis
intro: Stichorkis ovalis is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia, commonly known as the "Asian Stichorkis" or "Ovalis Stichorkis". The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can aid in wound healing and immune system support. Bioactive constituents of Stichorkis ovalis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its potential therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include tea infusions and extracts, as well as tinctures and capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
taxonomy: Stichorkis ovalis is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Stichorkis. The classification of Stichorkis ovalis places it within the subfamily Malpighioideae. This orchid is further classified into the tribe Malpighieae and the subtribe Rungieae. The classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same genus and family.
